title: vs Competitors
subtitle: Every competitor does part of the job. From Day 1 is the only one that brings it all together — natively, in France.

hero.title: Nobody combines all 7
hero.description: Seven Tier S capabilities. Each one exists somewhere at a competitor — no platform in the world combines them all.

frRights.title: Native French rights
frRights.desc: SACEM, ADAMI, SPEDIDAM, SPRE — tracked and reconciled automatically

urssaf.title: Auto URSSAF
urssaf.desc: Social filings generated and pre-filled, zero quarterly anxiety

audit.title: AI royalty audit
audit.desc: Gaps between expected and paid detected, claim letter generated

copilot.title: AI Copilot
copilot.desc: Answers in plain language on your data — not silent dashboards

fractional.title: Fractional
fractional.desc: Fractional investment in catalogs, the V3 rail

index.title: Public Day 1 Index
index.desc: 0-100 career health score, comparable and shareable

valuation.title: Valuation + simulator
valuation.desc: NPS × multiple, transparent range, deal simulator

table.title: The comparison table
table.subtitle: 12 capabilities × 6 platforms. Only one column is full.

rows.frRights: Native French rights (SACEM, ADAMI, SPEDIDAM, SPRE)

market.title: 33% of the market
market.desc: A third of recorded music revenue comes from independent artists. In France, no consolidated tool serves them in their language or under their law.

barrier.title: 18 months of R&D
barrier.desc: SACEM, ADAMI, SPEDIDAM, SPRE: the French regulatory barrier costs any US player at least 18 months of R&D to enter. Ours is already built.

risk.title: The real risk
risk.desc: A giant — Spotify, Believe, Chartmetric — extends its offer toward consolidation. The only answer: speed of execution, and France-first depth.

pitch.quote: An independent artist in France juggles six tools without ever seeing their career whole: stats on one side, an expense spreadsheet on the other, SACEM paying 18 months late, URSSAF as a quarterly panic. From Day 1 brings it all together — multi-DSP analytics, consolidated revenue, reconciled French rights, AI royalty audit, real-time catalog valuation. Chartmetric does stats. Stem does splits. Songtrust does publishing. Nobody does all seven, and nobody will do them in France within 18 months. We are already there. From {low} to {high} per month, from bedroom producer to indie label.
pitch.author: The investor pitch — From Day 1
